tools.name: get_exchange_rates
tools.description:
Get official NBU (National Bank of Ukraine) exchange rates.
    date format: YYYYMMDD or None for today. Returns: {rates, date, source}

tools.name: search_prozorro_tenders
tools.description:
Search Ukrainian public procurement tenders on Prozorro.
    Returns: {tenders: [{title, value, status, date_modified}]}

tools.name: geocode_ukraine
tools.description:
Geocode Ukrainian address to coordinates using OpenStreetMap Nominatim.
    Returns: {lat, lon, display_name, region, city}

tools.name: get_weather_ukraine
tools.description:
Get current weather for Ukrainian city using Open-Meteo (free, no auth).
    Returns: {temperature_c, windspeed, weathercode, city}
